hero.description: AI endpoint proxy with web dashboard - A JavaScript port of CLIProxyAPI. Works seamlessly with Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cline, RooCode, and other CLI tools.

getStarted.title: Get Started in 30 Seconds
getStarted.description: Install 9Router, configure your providers via web dashboard, and start routing AI requests.
getStarted.step1Desc: Run npx command to start the server instantly
getStarted.step2Desc: Configure providers and API keys via web interface
getStarted.step3Desc: Point your CLI tools to http://localhost:20128
getStarted.configNote: Configure providers in dashboard or use environment variables

howItWorks.title: How 9Router Works
howItWorks.description: Data flows seamlessly from your application through our intelligent routing layer to the best provider for the job.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Your requests start from your favorite tools or our unified SDK. Just change the base URL.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our engine analyzes the prompt, checks provider health, and routes for lowest latency or cost.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The request is fulfilled by OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or others instantly.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.description: Everything you need to manage your AI infrastructure in one place, built for scale.

unifiedEndpoint.title: Unified Endpoint
unifiedEndpoint.desc: Access all providers via a single standard API URL.

easySetup.title: Easy Setup
easySetup.desc: Get up and running in minutes with npx command.

modelFallback.title: Model Fallback
modelFallback.desc: Automatically switch providers on failure or high latency.

usageTracking.title: Usage Tracking
usageTracking.desc: Detailed analytics and cost monitoring across all models.

oauthApiKeys.title: OAuth & API Keys
oauthApiKeys.desc: Securely manage credentials in one vault.

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.desc: Sync your configurations across devices instantly.

cliSupport.title: CLI Support
cliSupport.desc: Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cline, Cursor, and more.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Visual dashboard for real-time traffic analysis.

footer.brandDescription: The unified endpoint for AI generation. Connect, route, and manage your AI providers with ease.

cta.title: Ready to Simplify Your AI Infrastructure?
cta.description: Join developers who are streamlining their AI integrations with 9Router. Open source and free to start.

mitm.title: MITM Proxy
mitm.description: Intercept CLI tool traffic and route through 9Router
